60秒任务: 「给建议」：目标/困难/建议/复盘；A=抓住逻辑并总结；B=曲解/漏行动项翻车。
目标功能: 目标｜习惯｜困难｜建议｜复盘｜未来重点
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
My advice is to ___.（提出建议）
You might want to ___.（柔和建议）
It may help to ___.（建议方法）
Try doing it for ten minutes first.（降低门槛）
Don’t try to do everything at once.（避免过载）
Focus on the part that matters most.（聚焦重点）
If you get stuck, ask for feedback.（应对困难）
You could compare your answer with an example.（使用范例）
That sounds helpful. I’ll try it.（接受建议）
I’m not sure that fits my schedule.（说明限制）
Then maybe choose a smaller step.（调整建议）
Let’s check what worked last time.（参考经验）
Keep the routine simple.（保持简单）
Give yourself time to improve.（鼓励）
I’ll start with the easiest step.（行动闭环）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: advice, feedback, example, schedule, routine, step, answer
Verbs: advise, try, focus, compare, fit, choose
Adjectives / Adverbs: helpful, simple, smaller, easiest
Time / Place: first, last time, ten minutes, at once
Chunks: you might want to, ask for feedback, fits my schedule, smaller step, keep it simple
